## Data Safety Checklist

<!-- REQUIRED: This project handles sensitive financial data. Confirm each item. -->

- [ ] I have NOT included any personal financial data in this PR
- [ ] I have NOT modified CLAUDE.md with personal information (income, debts, balances, goals)
- [ ] No files from `data/` or `reports/` are included in the diff
- [ ] No `.db` or `.sqlite` files are included in the diff
- [ ] I have checked `git diff` for account numbers (***NNNN), dollar amounts in context sections, or other PII
- [ ] If I forked this repo and used it with my own data, I have verified none of that data leaked into this PR
